enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder on December 5, 2016, explaining he missed the previous day's video after staying up late to help his mom move wood. He spent the day working on a 3D reconstruction/tracing project of ancient Rome — currently doing columns and planning the Roman Forum — while listening to a 'History of Byzantium' audiobook.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about progress and eager to start building structures one by one once tracing is complete
finds it frustrating that the Rome simulation keeps pulling you to ground level unexpectedly

claims.subject: Boulder
claims.claim: We're still in our cold spell.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to do my video yesterday because I got up to help my mom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was up until six helping my mom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to my mom's house to help put wood in the backyard.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working all day after helping my mom.

claims.subject: Xanthium
claims.claim: I was listening to the history of the Xanthium.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I found some cool source material related to the Xanthium.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did a bunch of apartment buildings yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of high right now.

claims.subject: Roman forum
claims.claim: I wanted to do the Roman forum today.

claims.subject: Roman forum
claims.claim: The Roman forum is the last complicated part to trace.

claims.subject: Roman forum
claims.claim: I have to do tiles from the ground for the Roman forum.

claims.subject: Roman forum
claims.claim: Tracing the temples in the Roman forum would take forever.

claims.subject: Roman forum
claims.claim: I have to do the roads in the Roman forum as well.

claims.subject: Roman Boulder
claims.claim: It's faster to trace the left Roman Boulder because it's more uniform.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can start building the Roman structures one after the other.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to start with the easiest Roman structure.

claims.subject: Rome
claims.claim: Rome is so active that it always pulls you down to ground level.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got pulled down to ground level in Rome, right into some statues.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm doing columns right now for the Roman structures.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought about how we should rebuild Rome.
